tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: Unique tenant identifier for multi-tenant data isolation.

source_instance_id.title: Source Instance ID
source_instance_id.description: Stable identifier for this connector instance (e.g., bitbucket-cloud-acme-prod).

username.title: Username
username.description: Bitbucket username for App Password authentication. Leave empty for OAuth Bearer token auth.

token.title: Token / App Password
token.description: Bitbucket App Password (used with username) or OAuth Bearer token.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: List of Bitbucket workspace slugs to collect data from.

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Limits first full run to commits on or after this date. Leave empty for no limit.

page_size.title: Page Size
page_size.description: Number of items per API page (max 100).

rate_limit_threshold.title: Rate Limit Threshold
rate_limit_threshold.description: Proactive backoff when remaining requests drop below this value.
